microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and eliminated manual bottlenecks across distributed infrastructure at cloud scale.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous-validation model for AI workloads.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict low-level infrastructure constraints.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — translating field-observed friction directly into shipped platform improvements.

Closed the engineering feedback loop by converting patterns observed across customer-impacting incidents into concrete API changes, runbook automation, and tooling that reduced recurrence and improved platform reliability for all users.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-powered code generation adoption** across 14 Azure engineering teams by leading hands-on technical demos and training sessions, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and closing the gap between ML tooling and developer workflows.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field feedback into actionable engineering specs.

Improved **ML infrastructure retrieval** by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search system using RAG architecture, cutting engineer lookup time by 83% across distributed teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ service teams with competing infrastructure dependencies.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch through discovery interviews with 20+ service teams, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — directly mirroring the automation-first mindset required for scalable cloud infrastructure.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target high-friction automation gaps and prioritize investments in scalable developer tooling and distributed systems support.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping low-level software dependencies across 1,200+ stations to ensure continuity across distributed robotics infrastructure.

Resolved **40+ high-priority engineering tickets** by facilitating Agile sprint planning and backlog triage, stabilizing the developer intake process and accelerating issue resolution for ML and systems engineering teams.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, cutting software deployment cycle time by 25% and eliminating manual handoffs that bottlenecked production rollouts at scale.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM system that eliminated manual process gaps and improved customer-facing response time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a data-driven digital go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel performance.

Improved leadership **pricing accuracy** by analyzing 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering a financial profitability model that informed smarter resource allocation and closed systemic revenue gaps.
